title: orchis × penzigiana nothosubsp. penzigiana
intro: Orchis × penzigiana nothosubsp. penzigiana, also known as Pergola's orchid, is a hybrid plant species in the Orchidaceae family, resulting from the cross between Orchis mascula and Orchis italica. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orchis × penzigiana nothosubsp. penzigiana are believed to include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
